string.name: EntryAbility_desc
string.value: Connect to BitFun desktop and control remote sessions

string.name: permission_camera_reason
string.value: 用于扫描 BitFun 桌面端远程连接二维码。

string.name: permission_read_pasteboard_reason
string.value: 用于粘贴 BitFun 桌面端远程连接链接。

string.name: permission_microphone_reason
string.value: 用于在会话详情页将语音转成待发送文字。
